author: Xbox YouTube
text:
HELLDIVERS™ 2 Campaign Brief: Census Thunder
The Frontline of Freedom confirms that new “Voids” are undemocratically unleashing Illuminate forces across the galaxy.

Helldivers are encouraged to investigate, contain the threat, and recover intelligence. Outstanding service may result in the choice of a fabulous new Fast Recon Vehicle!

Dive now to take the fight to the Squids and drive away with your new ride.
#Helldivers2 #FrontlineOfFreedom

HELLDIVERS™ 2 is Out now on XBOX
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/helldivers-2/9MX9WN9DFPGT

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
The Division 2: Into the Dark - Official Launch Trailer
Agents, it's time to venture into the dark.
 
This season, Hyenas flood the streets with a stronger, new supply of Spice, and Agents must go into the Dark Zones to fight back. Explore refreshed Dark Zones featuring weekly rotations, including a new PvE experience and a major PvP update across all modes. Plus, a new Incursion is coming later this season.
 
Packed with rotating Dark Zones, all-new Classified Assignments, a brand-new Season Pass, and an upcoming Incursion, Into the Dark is a season of intense risk, tactical choice, and high‑stakes extractions.
 
Play The Division 2: Into the Dark now.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/tom-clancys-the-division-2/BVQ3V30ZXVT5/0001

text:
Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth Expansion - Launch Trailer
Jurassic World Evolution 3: Rebirth Expansion – OUT NOW

Inspired by Jurassic World Rebirth, push the boundaries of science and develop the top-secret facility on Île Saint-Hubert before its downfall in 2010. Experience a blockbuster campaign, come face-to-face with four new dinosaurs, and develop your facilities with science expanding features!

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Copa City - Launch Trailer
Forget the dugout. Take charge of the streets. Copa City is officially OUT NOW on XBOX Series X|S! 

Get ready for the world’s first football tycoon game where you don’t manage the squad - you manage everything else. As the City Captain, the entire city is your canvas. You’ll be adapting the stadium, building fan zones, managing safety, and running the whole show for a global fanbase before the opening whistle even blows.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/copa-city/9n5nhd8srbw1
